badge: The Official Home for Vibe Coders
headline: Your identity doesn't fit in a CV. It's proven with products.
subheadline: LinkedIn lists your past jobs. Here you validate your talent by showing the real software you're capable of launching today.

error.invalid: Hmm, that email doesn't look valid

notLoggedIn.microcopy: No waitlists. Join and publish your first project today.

url.title: Your URL is your personal brand
url.body: Forget generic links. Your username becomes your digital business card. A unique web address that gives you identity and immediate professionalism, ready to share.

stack.title: Your Stack is your superpower
stack.body: Don't hide the magic. Proudly show the tools you master (Lovable, v0, Replit). Transparency shows you're at the forefront.

ecosystem.title: Connect your digital ecosystem
ecosystem.body: Your code lives on GitHub. Your network on LinkedIn. Your voice on X. Vibecoders is the meeting point where all your creative chaos makes sense.

reputation.title: Validate yourself as a "Shipper"
reputation.body: Separate yourself from those who only have ideas. A verified profile with functional projects tells the world: "I don't just promise, I build".
